channel.title: My New Hugo Project
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Project

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Bio

Noah Reef grew up in Palm Springs, California, and graduated from California State Polytechnic University, Pomona, with a B.S. in Applied Mathematics in 2024. In the fall of 2024, he began his Ph.D. studies in the Computational Science, Engineering, and Mathematics (CSEM) program. His hobbies include playing chess, reading, and programming.

Education

Ph.D. in Computational Science, Engineering and Mathematics, University of Texas at Austin (Expected May 2029)
item.content:
Bio

Noah Reef grew up in Palm Springs, California, and graduated from California State Polytechnic University, Pomona, with a B.S. in Applied Mathematics in 2024. In the fall of 2024, he began his Ph.D. studies in the Computational Science, Engineering, and Mathematics (CSEM) program. His hobbies include playing chess, reading, and programming.

Education

Ph.D. in Computational Science, Engineering and Mathematics, University of Texas at Austin (Expected May 2029)

  • Advisor: Dr. Stella Offner

B.S. in Applied Mathematics, California State Polytechnic University, Pomona (May 2024)

  • Summa Cum Laude
  • Minor in Computer Science

Research Interests

  • Machine Learning for Scientific Computing
  • Optimization
  • Numerical Analysis
  • High-Performance Computing

Links

  • Google Scholar
  • GitHub
  • LinkedIn
  • Curriculum Vitae (PDF)
